2603.20185.title: VideoSeek: Long-Horizon Video Agent with Tool-Guided Seeking
2603.20185.paper_summary: Video agentic models have advanced challenging video-language tasks. However, most agentic approaches still heavily rely on greedy parsing over densely sampled video frames, resulting in high computational cost. We present VideoSeek, a long-horizon video agent that leverages video logic flow to actively seek answer-critical evidence instead of exhaustively parsing the full video. This insight allows the model to use far fewer frames while maintaining, or even improving, its video understanding capability. VideoSeek operates in a think-act-observe loop with a well-designed toolkit for collecting multi-granular video observations. This design enables query-aware exploration over accumulated observations and supports practical video understanding and reasoning. Experiments on four challenging video understanding and reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that VideoSeek achieves strong accuracy while using far fewer frames than prior video agents and standalone LMMs. Notably, VideoSeek achieves a 10.2 absolute points improvement on LVBench over its base model, GPT-5, while using 93% fewer frames. Further analysis highlights the significance of leveraging video logic flow, strong reasoning capability, and the complementary roles of toolkit design.
2603.20185.paper_summary_zh: 視頻代理模型已經在挑戰性的視頻語言任務中取得了進展。<lb/>然而，大多數代理方法仍然在很大程度上依賴於對密集取樣的視頻幀進行貪婪解析，導致高計算成本。<lb/>我們提出了VideoSeek，一種長期視頻代理，利用視頻邏輯流程主動尋找關鍵證據，而不是全面解析整個視頻。<lb/>這一見解使模型能夠使用更少的幀，同時保持甚至改善其視頻理解能力。<lb/>VideoSeek在一個思考-行動-觀察的循環中運作，配備了一個精心設計的工具包，用於收集多粒度的視頻觀察。<lb/>這一設計使得對累積觀察的查詢感知探索成為可能，並支持實際的視頻理解和推理。<lb/>在四個具有挑戰性的視頻理解和推理基準上的實驗表明，VideoSeek在使用遠少於先前視頻代理和獨立LMM的幀的情況下，實現了強大的準確性。<lb/>值得注意的是，VideoSeek在LVBench上相對於其基礎模型GPT-5實現了10.2個絕對點的改進，同時使用了93%的幀更少。<lb/>進一步分析強調了利用視頻邏輯流程、強大的推理能力以及工具包設計的互補角色的重要性。
2603.20185.author: Jingyang Lin et.al.
2603.20185.authors: Jingyang Lin, Jialian Wu, Jiang Liu, Ximeng Sun, Ze Wang, Xiaodong Yu, Jiebo Luo, Zicheng Liu, Emad Barsoum
